expectations.text: Mentions sawtooth, square, triangle, or sine waveforms

expectations.evidence: note("c2").s("sawtooth")   // sawtooth wave — bright, classic synth bass
Chain `.lpf()` for a low-pass filter to warm up the bass: note("c2 e2 g2").s("sawtooth").lpf(500)
